name: Rhubarb Streusel Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Frozen rhubarb, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Prepare the Streusel Topping and set aside.
4. Arrange the rhubarb evenly in the pie plate.
5. In a blender, beat together the remaining ingredients until smooth for about 15 seconds on high.
6. Pour the batter into the pie plate.
7. Sprinkle the Streusel Topping evenly over the filling.
8. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
9. Serve with sweetened whipped cream if desired.
Note:
- For higher altitudes, grease a 10-inch pie plate and decrease the rhubarb to 2 1/2-3 cups. Decrease the baking mix to 1/4 cup; add 1/4 cup flour.
